content.rendered:
What is intelligence really? Is it just your brain and how fast you can think, draw connections and resolve problems? This article does not offer an answer to that question, but it does teach you some vocabulary!

Finnish English
Adjektiiveja Adjectives
älykäs intelligent
nokkela clever / smart
loistava brilliant
monimutkainen complicated
nero genius
nerokas ingenious
viisas wise
fiksu smart
järkevä sensible
järjellinen rational
harkittu premeditated, deliberate
lahjakas talented
oppivainen capable of learning
oppimishaluinen willing to learn
Verbejä Verbs
ajatella to think
hahmottaa to perceive
harkita to consider
järkeillä to reason
keksiä to invent
keskittyä to concentrate
miettiä to reflect
muistaa to remember
olettaa to assume
ottaa huomioon to take into consideration
ratkaista ongelmia to solve problems
soveltaa tietoa to apply knowledge
suunnitella to plan
tajuta to realize
tehdä johtopäätöksiä to draw conclusions
tutkia to research, examine
unohtaa to forget
yhdistää tietoja to combine data
ymmärtää to understand
Finnish English
Substantiiveja Nouns
aivot brain
ajattelija thinker
ajatus thought
asiantuntija expert
fakta, tosiasia fact
johtopäätös conclusion
kasvomuisti memory for faces
keksintö invention
keskityskyky ability to concentrate
kyky ability
lahjakkuus talent
loogisuus logic
muisti memory
muisto a memory
oletus assumption
ongelma problem
oppimiskyky ability to learn
ratkaisu solution
taito skill
tieto knowledge
todennäköisyys probability
uteliaisuus curiosity
ymmärrys understanding
äly intellect
älykkyys intelligence
älykkyysosamäärä IQ

Time for some mathematics vocabulary next?

excerpt.rendered: What is intelligence really? Is it just your brain? This article does not offer an answer to that question, but it does teach you some Finnish vocabulary!
